# MedCheckWize

> Medicare & Medicaid Costs by State

Compare Medicare and Medicaid costs, coverage, and healthcare expenses across all 50 US states. Find procedure costs, premium estimates, and coverage details.

## Core pages
- [Methodology and data sources](https://medcheckwize.com/methodology/): how every figure is derived, with primary-source citations
- [About and editorial standards](https://medcheckwize.com/about/): authorship and review policy

## Key procedure
- [Alabama](https://medcheckwize.com/state/alabama/)
- [Alaska](https://medcheckwize.com/state/alaska/)
- [Arizona](https://medcheckwize.com/state/arizona/)
- [Arkansas](https://medcheckwize.com/state/arkansas/)
- [California](https://medcheckwize.com/state/california/)
- [Colorado](https://medcheckwize.com/state/colorado/)
- [Connecticut](https://medcheckwize.com/state/connecticut/)
- [Delaware](https://medcheckwize.com/state/delaware/)
- [Florida](https://medcheckwize.com/state/florida/)
- [Georgia](https://medcheckwize.com/state/georgia/)
- [Hawaii](https://medcheckwize.com/state/hawaii/)
- [Idaho](https://medcheckwize.com/state/idaho/)

## Data
- Primary sources: CMS Provider Data, KFF Health Policy, US Census ACS
- All figures are derived from these primary sources; see /methodology/ for derivation and vintage.
